{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230043217D2C6873FB0B2A03B0D2"}"},"total":403},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459043420315157273","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在综漫文里算是比较好的了，还是挺喜欢主角人设的，日常轻松文里又夹杂着打斗和热血，可惜太短了，许多情感铺垫和感情戏有些节奏太快，以至于什么都做了却没有留下什么美好的回忆，个人感觉还是雪之下雪乃和樱岛麻衣的感情戏比较喜欢，其他或多或少有些进度太快或根本没什么进度，挺遗憾的
有一句话说得好：我们彼此错过，因为渴望重逢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736697643,"group_id":"7181319339088284672","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"余念向来难安，而我一直孤单","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0djXcwoWwmjpQR3C6Kyke86sU0b8mkOIPx/dhjOGJmO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3e1912f3c76243479ec3f7e6393d50c2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796258&x-signature=HZf9qE1908kqzolwHwe7geTaDSw%3D","user_id":"3056254154183261","user_name":"安在夏烬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3056254154183261","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7181319339088284672","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】【主日常】【春物、五等分、兔女郎学姐等】【魔改】【多女主】

开玩笑，我可是一个励志做渣男的神明，你让我表白？

雪乃，你人设崩了吧………

late_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":63467,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":73992,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5448},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7332876146023416600","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔很好，这本书追了很久了也算是历经坎坷，大部分女主的性格都有塑造，作为神明出场的剧情很新颖[思考]最后的结尾很完美但是感觉还是有点仓促了，很多坑都没有填好[捂脸]但真正到了最后也都不计较这些了，最后希望作者能再开一部佳作[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707320264,"group_id":"7181319339088284672","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"734120026582269"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7181319339088284672","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8721,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7219679943461880611","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的可以，内容挺新颖的，有毒但不多放心食用，情感线也还行不像某些书女主无脑贴，就是跟某书剧情构架有点相似，背景故事也有点毒[思考]作者优点是日常，这本书平常带着看就行了[你细品]作者太短了[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680962785,"group_id":"7181319339088284672","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"灯灭了，我的意思是即使漫夜将至你也是我生命中唯一的光.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5BqeOOvyWQLyWpVepMqTNk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ba6f5160ca2b4d87abe3b08e27b617d8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792322&x-signature=InW5S
